## Why Quantification Matters in Modern Society {.unnumbered}

## Lecture Video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/6PELgSQLwfo?si=7uM2hirPtwJXW1pr" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Lecture Slides

Click [here](slides/V1.SocQuant_WJR_2025.26_edited.pdf) to access the lecture slides.
